Name: Combat Simulator
Author: zysilm
Punchline: Run local party battles with NPCs and field enemies.
Description: A client-side combat simulator for local field battles, NPC targets, and companion skirmishes. Features party-style combat, target selection, NPC AI, action VFX, HP overlays, death cam, active camera, and high-precision ragdoll physics. All combat is simulated locally - no data is sent to the server.
